title: mesembryanthemum prostratum
intro: Mesembryanthemum prostratum, also known as ice plant, is a succulent plant that belongs to the family Aizoaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mesembryanthemum prostratum include its ability to soothe skin conditions such as eczema and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin elasticity. Mesembryanthemum prostratum can be prepared as a topical cream or salve, and it is also used in herbal teas and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
